block_01: This pattern that reminds a flag is not rare to find on charts. It is one of the most popular patterns because of its simplicity and the opportunities that it indicates: spotting a flag early on may allow a trader to “ride” a long trend.
block_02: It can be found after a breakout or during a strong trending market, when a consolidation happens. It is universally applicable on short and long timeframes and it can be used on a candlestick chart with any asset.
block_05: Last week we published the first part of this series. Here are 5 more indicators (ADX, Bollinger Bands, DPO, Fractal and the Awesome Oscillator) quickly explained: how to read them, when to buy and when to sell. Leave a comment if you wish to learn about any other indicators on the platform!
block_07: What is the best time to trade?
block_08: Quite often finding the right moment is the key factor that might determine if the deal will be in or out-of-money. One way to find it is to learn about the trading sessions and the news.
